_comment: Conservative baseline thresholds for the CI smoke regression gate. Each p99_ms value represents the maximum acceptable p99 latency before a 2x multiplier is applied. Measured on a GitHub Actions ubuntu-24.04 runner with mocked Qdrant and embedding. Update by running `python -m benchmarks.enterprise.scenarios.smoke --no-check-baselines --output .benchmarks/enterprise/smoke_calibration.json` and reviewing the p99 values.

store.note: Store path: SQLite pool acquire + FTS upsert + graph entity write + outbox enqueue. Mocked Qdrant/embed.

search.note: Search path: SQLite FTS5 query + rank fusion. Mocked Qdrant/embed/LLM.
